semantic.role: TypeScript compiler configuration for ArchSpine project, defining how TypeScript source code is compiled into JavaScript for Node.js execution.
responsibilities: Set ECMAScript target and module system
Manage output directory and source file inclusion
Specify type definitions to include (Node.js built-ins)
invariants: Strict type-checking mode must remain enabled to maintain code safety
NodeNext module and moduleResolution ensure compatibility with Node.js ESM
Force consistent file name casing prevents cross-platform issues
Source files must reside under ./src and output under ./dist

English.role: TypeScript compiler configuration for ArchSpine project, defining how TypeScript source code is compiled into JavaScript for Node.js execution.

parameter_definitions.target: Sets the ECMAScript target version. 'ESNext' uses the latest features, which may require Node.js >= 22.
parameter_definitions.module: Specifies the module system. 'NodeNext' enables Node.js native ESM with .mjs/.cjs extensions.
parameter_definitions.moduleResolution: Defines how modules are resolved. 'NodeNext' follows Node.js ESM resolution algorithm.
parameter_definitions.outDir: Output directory for compiled JavaScript files. Set to './dist'.
parameter_definitions.rootDir: Root directory of input TypeScript source. Set to './src'.
parameter_definitions.strict: Enables full strict type-checking. Improves code safety but may cause many type errors initially.
parameter_definitions.esModuleInterop: Allows default imports from CommonJS modules. Smooths interop between ESM and CJS.
parameter_definitions.skipLibCheck: Skips type checking of .d.ts files. Speeds compilation but can hide library type errors.
parameter_definitions.forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: Enforces consistent file name casing across all files. Prevents issues on case-insensitive systems.
parameter_definitions.types: Includes Node.js built-in type definitions (process, fs, etc.).
parameter_definitions.sourceMap: Generates source maps for debugging. Increases output size but aids in development.
parameter_definitions.include: Glob pattern for files to compile. Only includes files under 'src/'.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration enforces strict type safety and modern Node.js ESM compatibility, which enhances code reliability but may introduce build failures if the codebase is not fully typed or uses legacy patterns. The 'skipLibCheck' option reduces compilation time but can mask type issues in third-party libraries. The use of 'ESNext' target might not be supported by older Node.js runtimes, potentially causing runtime errors. Overall, this setup is stable for new development with up-to-date Node.js, but migration from older configurations may require adjustments.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 项目的 TypeScript 编译器配置，定义了如何将 TypeScript 源代码编译为适用于 Node.js 的 JavaScript。

parameter_definitions.target: 设置 ECMAScript 目标版本。'ESNext' 使用最新特性，可能需要 Node.js >= 22。
parameter_definitions.module: 指定模块系统。'NodeNext' 启用 Node.js 原生 ESM，支持 .mjs/.cjs 扩展名。
parameter_definitions.moduleResolution: 定义模块解析方式。'NodeNext' 遵循 Node.js ESM 解析算法。
parameter_definitions.outDir: 编译后 JavaScript 文件的输出目录，设为 './dist'。
parameter_definitions.rootDir: TypeScript 源文件的根目录，设为 './src'。
parameter_definitions.strict: 启用完整严格类型检查。提升代码安全性，但初期可能导致大量类型错误。
parameter_definitions.esModuleInterop: 允许从 CommonJS 模块进行默认导入。平滑 ESM 与 CJS 互操作。
parameter_definitions.skipLibCheck: 跳过对 .d.ts 文件的类型检查。加快编译速度，但可能隐藏库的类型错误。
parameter_definitions.forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: 强制所有文件使用一致的命名大小写。防止不区分大小写的系统上的问题。
parameter_definitions.types: 包含 Node.js 内置类型定义（如 process、fs 等）。
parameter_definitions.sourceMap: 生成源码映射文件，便于调试。增加输出体积，但有助于开发。
parameter_definitions.include: 需要编译的文件匹配模式。仅包含 'src/' 目录下的文件。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 该配置强制严格类型安全和现代 Node.js ESM 兼容性，增强了代码可靠性，但如果代码库未完全类型化或使用旧模式，可能会导致构建失败。'skipLibCheck' 选项减少了编译时间，但可能掩盖第三方库的类型问题。'ESNext' 目标可能不被旧版 Node.js 运行时支持，从而引起运行时错误。总体而言，此设置适用于最新 Node.js 的新开发，但从旧配置迁移时可能需要调整。
